phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è l'accesso per le sale del trono, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH la-CHESS-soh per leh SAH-leh del TROH-noh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Al piano nobile, seguire le frecce.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL pee-AH-noh noh-BEE-leh seh-goo-EE-reh LEH FREHCH-cheh
likely_response.translation_en: On the noble floor, follow arrows.

responses.english: On the noble floor, follow arrows.
responses.phonetic: AHL pee-AH-noh noh-BEE-leh seh-goo-EE-reh LEH FREHCH-cheh
responses.local: Al piano nobile, seguire le frecce.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, a che ora chiude l'armeria oggi, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, ah keh OH-rah KYOO-deh lar-meh-REE-ah OD-jee, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: Hours are posted at the entrance.

responses.english: Hours are posted at the entrance.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa il biglietto per il giardino, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAN-toh COS-tah eel bee-LYET-toh per eel jar-DEE-noh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated at the ticket office.

responses.english: It is indicated at the ticket office.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove posso lasciare il cappotto, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh POS-soh lah-SHAH-reh eel kap-POT-toh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: There is a cloakroom at main entrance.

responses.english: There is a cloakroom at main entrance.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, a che ora apre il museo?
phrases.pronunciation: bwon-JOR-noh ah kay OR-ah AH-preh eel moo-ZEH-oh

likely_response.translation_en: It opens at nine in the morning.

responses.english: It opens at nine in the morning.
